data.source: Baseball Savant Statcast terminal PA rows
data.row_grain: one non-empty events row per terminal plate appearance

official_reference.note: The supplied official denominator is a cross-check only; training retains every shared-predicate terminal Statcast row.

opportunity_model.separation_note: Opportunity estimates PA count only; no contact-quality feature enters this model.

evaluation.calibration_support_rule: beats baseline on Brier and log loss; absolute mean gap <= 0.005; ECE <= 0.01
evaluation.conclusion: Held-out evidence supports describing this fitted model as calibrated under the stated rule.

provenance.coefficients: fitted from chronological training rows; none are hand-authored
provenance.shrinkage: empirical-Bayes prior strength selected on validation rows
provenance.feature_cutoff: all rolling features are frozen at the start of each slate date; same-date outcomes are excluded
provenance.test_policy: latest chronological block evaluated once after model selection
